title: How to Make Your AI Agents Work Better (With Context Hygiene)
summary: Jordan Urbs presents context hygiene as a three-layer approach to maintaining AI agent state and behavior across conversations. The technique involves Skills, Harnesses, and Hygiene layers, along with multi-agent orchestration to keep context windows clean and prevent information loss.
